metadata.title: About | Slashie
metadata.description: Slashie connects people who need local tasks done with workers who quote, deliver, and build reputation on the map.

en.heading: About Slashie
paragraphs: Slashie is a map-first local task marketplace. Customers post what needs doing; workers browse nearby tasks and send quotes. When work is booked, payment stays between customer and worker — Slashie focuses on discovery, quoting, and trust.
Workers can start on a free quote tier or subscribe to Slashie Unlimited for unlimited quoting. Customers post tasks for free. Platform billing is separate from job payments.

metadata.title: 關於 | Slashie
metadata.description: Slashie 連接需要本地任務幫手的人與能報價、完成工作並在地圖上建立信譽的工作者。

zh_hk.heading: 關於 Slashie
paragraphs: Slashie 是地圖優先的本地任務市場。客戶發布需要完成的事項；工作者瀏覽附近任務並發送報價。任務確認後，付款由客戶和工作者直接安排 — Slashie 專注於探索、報價和信任。
工作者可先使用免費報價額度，或訂閱 Slashie Unlimited 取得無限報價。客戶可免費發布任務。平台訂閱收費與任務付款分開。
